text:
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 1 = A fee-for-service (FFS) Medicaid or Medicaid-expansion claim 

2 = Medicaid or Medicaid-expansion capitated payment 

3 = Medicaid or Medicaid-expansion Managed Care encounter (a.k.a. “Dummy”) record that simulates 
a bill for a service rendered to a patient covered under some form of Capitation Plan. This includes 
billing records submitted by providers to non-state entities (e.g., MCOs, health plans) for which the 
State has no financial liability since the
